2606.09450.title: TheoremBench: Evaluating LLMs on Theorem Proving in Formal Mathematics
2606.09450.paper_summary: LLMs have recently achieved strong results on formal proving benchmarks. However, existing evaluations remain heavily concentrated on competition-style problems and often fail to capture how models behave on longer, more dependency-rich mathematical developments. We introduce TheoremBench, a Lean4 benchmark designed to evaluate theorem provers beyond contest settings. The benchmark is built from nearly one hundred classical theorems and is released in two complementary forms: a plain main version containing one target theorem per instance, and a premised version that expands each theorem into a structured family of related proving tasks consisting of the main theorem together with automatically extracted supporting subtheorems. This design enables evaluation of not only whether the final theorem was proved from scratch, but also of partial progress through the internal proof structure of a theorem. Our experiments show that explicit premises substantially improve performance for Lean4-capable prover models. To provide a comprehensive evaluation, we introduce theorem-level coverage and token-efficiency metrics that expose qualitative differences in proof behavior. The results show that current provers remain strongly biased toward easy subtheorems and often solve theorems through long and inefficient tactic traces rather than compact proof plans. TheoremBench therefore provides a more fine-grained view of formal reasoning ability and highlights the importance of structural benchmark design for evaluating Lean4 theorem provers.
2606.09450.paper_summary_zh: LLMs 最近在形式證明基準上取得了強勁的成果。<lb/>然而，現有的評估仍然過於集中於競賽風格的問題，並且常常無法捕捉模型在更長、更依賴的數學發展中的表現。<lb/>我們介紹 TheoremBench，一個設計用於評估定理證明者的 Lean4 基準，超越比賽環境。<lb/>該基準由近一百個經典定理構成，並以兩種互補的形式發布：一個包含每個實例一個目標定理的普通主版本，以及一個擴展每個定理為一個結構化相關證明任務家族的前提版本，該家族包括主要定理以及自動提取的支持子定理。<lb/>這種設計不僅能評估最終定理是否從頭證明，還能評估通過定理的內部證明結構的部分進展。<lb/>我們的實驗顯示，明確的前提顯著提高了 Lean4 能力證明模型的性能。<lb/>為了提供全面的評估，我們引入了定理級覆蓋率和令牌效率指標，這些指標揭示了證明行為中的質量差異。<lb/>結果顯示，當前的證明者仍然強烈偏向於簡單的子定理，並且常常通過長而低效的策略痕跡來解決定理，而不是緊湊的證明計劃。<lb/>因此，TheoremBench 提供了對形式推理能力的更細緻的觀察，並突顯了結構基準設計在評估 Lean4 定理證明者中的重要性。
2606.09450.author: QuocViet Pham et.al.
2606.09450.authors: QuocViet Pham, Elvir Karimov, Andrey Galichin, Ivan Oseledets
